name: python3-markupsafe
title: python3-markupsafe
description:
HTML/XHTML/XML string library
MarkupSafe is a Python library implementing a unicode subclass that is
aware of HTML escaping rules. It can be used to implement automatic
string escaping.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-markupsafe because HTML/XHTML/XML string library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-markupsafe as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-markupsafe with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-markupsafe --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
